sentences.english: About three things I was absolutely positive.
First,
Edward was a vampire.
Second,
there was a part of him,
and I didn't know how dominant that part might be,
sentences.shadowing: and‿I didn't know how DOMINANT that PART might be, ↘

sentences.english: That thirsted for my blood.
sentences.chinese: 不知道占据了他身体多少

sentences.english: And third,
I was unconditionally and irrevocably in love with him.
sentences.chinese: 我无条件且无可挽回地爱上了他。

sentences.english: Monte Carlo? That's our prom theme?
sentences.chinese: 蒙特卡洛那就是舞会的主题

sentences.english: Gambling, tuxedos, and Bond, James Bond.
sentences.chinese: 赌钱礼服还有007邦德詹姆斯·邦德
sentences.shadowing: Gambling / tuxedos / and Bond / JAMES BOND. ↘

sentences.english: Oh, my God.
You know, everybody's staring.
Not that guy. No, he just looked.
sentences.chinese: 那家伙不算他望一下而已
sentences.shadowing: Not that guy. No / he JUST LOOKED. ↘

sentences.english: I'm breaking all the rules now anyway.
sentences.shadowing: I'm breaking‿all the rules NOW ANYWAY. ↘

sentences.english: Since I'm going to hell.
So, does a person have to be dying
sentences.shadowing: So / does‿a PERSON have to be DYING ↘

sentences.english: to become like you?
No, that's just Carlisle.
sentences.chinese: 不是，那只是卡莱尔的原则。

sentences.english: He'd never do this to someone who had another choice.
sentences.chinese: 他绝不会对还有其他选择的人这样做。
sentences.shadowing: He'd never do this to someone who had‿ANOTHER CHOICE. ↘

sentences.english: So, how long have you been like this?
sentences.shadowing: So / how LONG have you been LIKE this? ↗

sentences.english: Since 1918.
That's when Carlisle found me dying of Spanish influenza.
sentences.chinese: 卡莱尔发现我将死于西班牙流感
sentences.shadowing: That's when Carlisle found me dying‿of SPANISH INFLUENZA. ↘

sentences.english: What was it like?
The venom was excruciating.
But what Carlisle did was much harder.
sentences.chinese: 但卡莱尔要承受更多的痛苦
sentences.shadowing: But what Carlisle did was MUCH HARDER. ↘

sentences.english: Not many of us have the restraint to do that.
sentences.chinese: 我们之中没多少个有他那样的控制力
sentences.shadowing: Not MANY of‿us have the RESTRAINT to do that. ↘

sentences.english: But didn't he just have to bite?
sentences.chinese: 不是咬一下就可以了吗
sentences.shadowing: But didn't he JUST have to BITE? ↗

sentences.english: Not exactly.
When we taste
human blood, a sort of frenzy begins,
sentences.shadowing: human blood / a sort‿of FRENZY BEGINS, ↘

sentences.english: and it's almost impossible to stop.
But Carlisle did.
First with me and then with his wife, Esme.
sentences.chinese: 先是我然后是他妻子埃斯米
sentences.shadowing: First with me and then with his WIFE / ESME. ↘

sentences.english: So is Carlisle the real reason that you don't kill people?
sentences.chinese: 所以卡莱尔就是你不杀人的真正原因
sentences.shadowing: So is Carlisle the real reason that you don't KILL PEOPLE? ↗

sentences.english: No, he's not the only reason.
sentences.shadowing: No / he's not the ONLY REASON. ↘

sentences.english: I don't want to be a monster.
sentences.shadowing: I don't WANT to be a MONSTER. ↘

sentences.english: My family, we think of ourselves as vegetarians, right,
sentences.chinese: 我的家人自喻为素食主义者
sentences.shadowing: My family / we think‿of‿ourselves‿as VEGETARIANS / RIGHT, ↘

sentences.english: 'Cause we only survive on the blood of animals.
sentences.chinese: 因为我们只吸动物的血
sentences.shadowing: 'Cause we only survive on the BLOOD of‿ANIMALS. ↘

sentences.english: But it's...
It's like a human only living on tofu.
sentences.chinese: 一个人一辈子只吃豆腐
sentences.shadowing: It's like a human‿only LIVING on TOFU. ↘

sentences.english: It keeps you strong, but you're never fully satisfied.
sentences.chinese: 它能让你身体健康但你永远也得不到满足
sentences.shadowing: It keeps you strong / but you're never FULLY SATISFIED. ↘

sentences.english: It wouldn't be like drinking your blood, for instance.
sentences.chinese: 但吸你的血就大不一样了
sentences.shadowing: It wouldn't be like drinking your BLOOD / for‿INSTANCE. ↘

sentences.english: Was it other vampires that killed Waylon?
sentences.chinese: 伟伦是被其他吸血鬼杀的吗

sentences.english: Yeah.
There are others out there, and we run into them from time to time.
sentences.chinese: 外面也有其他吸血鬼我们不时会遇上他们
sentences.shadowing: There are others‿out there / and we run‿into them from TIME to TIME. ↘

sentences.english: Can the rest of your family read people's minds like you can?
sentences.chinese: 你家族其他成员也像你那样懂读心术的吗
sentences.shadowing: Can the rest‿of your family read people's MINDS LIKE you can? ↗

sentences.english: No. That's just me.
But Alice can see the future.
I bet she saw me coming.
sentences.chinese: 那我猜她知道我会来这里
sentences.shadowing: I bet she SAW me COMING. ↘

sentences.english: Alice's visions are subjective.
sentences.chinese: 爱丽丝预见的未来是很主观的

sentences.english: I mean, the future can always change.
sentences.chinese: 未来往往是可以改变的
sentences.shadowing: I mean / the future can‿ALWAYS CHANGE. ↘

sentences.english: Could you act human? I mean, I've got neighbors.
sentences.chinese: 你能像个人样吗我有邻居在的
sentences.shadowing: Could you act human? I mean / I've GOT NEIGHBORS. ↘

sentences.english: I'm gonna take you to my place tomorrow.
sentences.shadowing: I'm gonna take you to my PLACE TOMORROW. ↘

sentences.english: Thanks.
- Wait, like, with your family? - Yeah.
sentences.shadowing: - Wait / like / with your FAMILY? - YEAH. ↘

sentences.english: What if they don't like me?
So, you're worried not because you'll be in a house full of vampires,
sentences.chinese: 你不是担心你要跟满屋子的吸血鬼在一起
sentences.shadowing: So / you're worried not because you'll be in‿a house FULL of VAMPIRES, ↘

sentences.english: but because you think they won't approve of you?
sentences.chinese: 而是担心他们不承认你
sentences.shadowing: but because you think they WON'T APPROVE of you? ↗

sentences.english: I'm glad I amuse you.
What is it?
Complication.
I'll pick you up tomorrow.
Hey. Come to visit your truck?
sentences.shadowing: Hey. Come to VISIT your TRUCK? ↗

sentences.english: Looks good. Got that dent out.
sentences.chinese: 看起来挺好凹面修好了
sentences.shadowing: Looks good. Got that DENT OUT. ↘

sentences.english: - Yeah. - Actually, we came to visit your flat-screen.
sentences.shadowing: - Yeah. - Actually / we came to visit your FLAT-SCREEN. ↘

sentences.english: First Mariners game of the season.
sentences.chinese: 水手队本季第一场比赛
sentences.shadowing: First Mariners GAME of the SEASON. ↘

sentences.english: Plus Jacob here keeps bugging me about seeing you again.
sentences.shadowing: Plus Jacob here keeps bugging me about SEEING you AGAIN. ↘

sentences.english: Great, Dad. Thanks.
Just keeping it real, son.
Vitamin R.
Well done, Chief.
Harry Clearwater's homemade fish fry.
Good man.
Any luck with that Waylon case?
sentences.shadowing: Any luck with that WAYLON CASE? ↗

sentences.english: Well, I don't think it was an animal that killed him.
sentences.chinese: 我认为他不是被野兽杀的
sentences.shadowing: Well / I don't think‿it was‿an‿animal that KILLED HIM. ↘

sentences.english: Never thought it was.
So spread the word out at the rez, huh?
sentences.chinese: 在保留区有把话传出去了吗
sentences.shadowing: So spread the word‿out‿at the REZ / HUH? ↗

sentences.english: Keep the kids out of the woods.
sentences.shadowing: Keep the kids‿OUT of the WOODS. ↘

sentences.english: Will do.
Don't want no one else getting hurt, do we?
sentences.chinese: 不想再有任何人受到伤害
sentences.shadowing: Don't want no one else GETTING HURT / do we? ↗

sentences.english: Whoa.
This is incredible.
It's so light and open, you know?
What did you expect, coffins and dungeons and moats?
sentences.chinese: 你想看到什么棺材地牢还是壕沟
sentences.shadowing: What did you expect / coffins‿and DUNGEONS and MOATS? ↗

sentences.english: No, not the moats.
Not the moats.
This is the one place we don't have to hide.
sentences.chinese: 我们在这里不用遮遮掩掩
sentences.shadowing: This‿is the one place we DON'T have to HIDE. ↘

sentences.english: I told them not to do this.
sentences.chinese: 我告诉过他们别这么做
sentences.shadowing: I told THEM NOT to do this. ↘

sentences.english: You add a little bit of olive oil to a non-stick saute pan,
sentences.chinese: 在不粘锅里加上一点橄榄油
sentences.shadowing: You add‿a little bit‿of‿olive oil to a non-stick SAUTE PAN, ↘

sentences.english: and you want to cook with the olive oil in medium-high heat.
sentences.shadowing: and you want to cook with the olive oil‿in medium-HIGH HEAT. ↘

sentences.english: What I do, I cut this in strips, and then we gonna cut this...
sentences.chinese: 把这个切成条然后我们切这个
sentences.shadowing: What‿I do / I cut this‿in strips / and then we GONNA CUT this... ↘

sentences.english: - Is she even Italian? - Her name is Bella.
sentences.shadowing: - Is she even‿Italian? - Her NAME is BELLA. ↘

sentences.english: I'm sure she'll love it, no matter what.
sentences.chinese: 我肯定不管什么她都会喜欢的
sentences.shadowing: I'm sure she'll love it / no MATTER WHAT. ↘

sentences.english: Get a whiff of that.
Here comes the human.
Bella, we're making Italiano for you.
sentences.chinese: 贝拉我们在做意大利菜给你吃
sentences.shadowing: Bella / we're MAKING ITALIANO for you. ↘

sentences.english: Bella, this is Esme. My mother for all intents and purposes.
sentences.chinese: 贝拉，这是埃斯梅。严格来说，她是我的母亲。
sentences.shadowing: Bella / this‿is‿Esme. My mother for‿all‿INTENTS and PURPOSES. ↘

sentences.english: You've given us an excuse to use the kitchen for the first time.
sentences.chinese: 你给了我们第一次使用厨房的理由
sentences.shadowing: You've given‿us‿an‿excuse to use the kitchen for the FIRST TIME. ↘

sentences.english: I hope you're hungry.
- Yeah, absolutely. - She already ate.
Perfect.
Yeah, it's just because I know that you guys don't eat...
sentences.shadowing: Yeah / it's just because I know that you guys DON'T EAT... ↘

sentences.english: Of course. It's very considerate of you.
sentences.shadowing: Of course. It's VERY CONSIDERATE of you. ↘

sentences.english: - Just ignore Rosalie. I do. - Yeah.
Let's just keep pretending like this isn't dangerous for all of us.
sentences.chinese: 我们就继续假装她不会危害到我们
sentences.shadowing: Let's just keep pretending like this‿isn't DANGEROUS for‿ALL of‿us. ↘

sentences.english: I would never tell anybody anything.
She knows that.
Yeah, well, the problem is, you two have gone public now, so...
sentences.chinese: 好问题是你们俩公开在一起了所以
sentences.shadowing: Yeah / well / the problem‿is / you two have gone PUBLIC NOW / so... ↘

sentences.english: Emmett.
No, she should know.
The entire family will be implicated if this ends badly.
sentences.chinese: 如果你们出了问题整个家族都会被牵连
sentences.shadowing: The entire family will be implicated‿if this‿ENDS BADLY. ↘

sentences.english: Badly, as in...
I would become the meal.
Hi, Bella.
I'm Alice.
- Hi. - Hi.
You do smell good.
Alice, what are you...
It's okay. Bella and I are gonna be great friends.
sentences.chinese: 没事我和贝拉会成为好朋友的
sentences.shadowing: It's‿okay. Bella and‿I are gonna be GREAT FRIENDS. ↘

sentences.english: Sorry, Jasper's our newest vegetarian.
sentences.chinese: 对不起贾斯珀刚刚开始吃素

sentences.english: It's a little difficult for him.
It's a pleasure to meet you.
It's okay, Jasper. You won't hurt her.
sentences.chinese: 没事的贾斯珀你不会伤害她
sentences.shadowing: It's‿okay / Jasper. You WON'T HURT her. ↘

sentences.english: All right, I'm gonna take you on a tour of the rest of the house.
sentences.chinese: 好了我想带你去别的地方看一下
sentences.shadowing: All right / I'm gonna take you on‿a tour‿of the REST of the HOUSE. ↘

sentences.english: - Okay. - Well, I'll see you soon.
sentences.shadowing: - Okay. - Well / I'll SEE you SOON. ↘

sentences.english: Okay.
- Cute! - I know.
I think that went well.
Clean this up. Now.
Was that as weird for you as it was for me?
sentences.shadowing: Was that‿as WEIRD for you as‿it was for me? ↗
